name: Window Organizer
description: Lists and tiles open windows on the current desktop
author: AgentOS

steps.command: Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -ne '' } | Select-Object Name, Id, MainWindowTitle | Format-Table -AutoSize

steps.description: Tile windows using Windows snap (sends Win+Left/Right keys hint)
steps.command: Write-Output 'Use Win+Left / Win+Right to snap windows, or Win+D to show desktop. For auto-tiling, consider FancyZones (PowerToys).'
